Petition For The Appointment Of Successor Trustee
TENTATIVE RULING: Continued to 8/24/26 at request of counsel. NOTE: the notice of hearing filed on 6/12/26 did not provide 30 day notice.
EXAMINER: SEAN BANG

Petition For The Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Continued To Jun-22-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Savannah Aube, Esq. appearing representing Kristine Zaback, Petitioner.

Court requires a bond, unless counsel gets waiver of bond.
Hearing on Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee is continued to Jun-22-2026 at 09:00 a.m. in Department 204 to obtain waivers.

Judge: Michael McNaughton; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Not reported (D204)
